mano_cua.result_summary: CSS word-break: break-all 导致所有英文单词在字母中间任意断行（如 likeness→li+keness, intact→int+act），DevTools 确认根因在 medium-editor.css:209 的 [data-medium-editor-element] { word-break: break-all }
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Now I can clearly see the complete CSS rule that causes the bug: [data-medium-editor-element] { word-break: break-all; min-height: 30px; } in medium-editor.css:209. This word-break: break-all value causes all text—including normal words—to break at any character position without respecting word boundaries.
